app.title: Taxinator
app.description: Self-hosted back office for freelancers: receipts, invoices, and tax reporting
app.tagline: Self-hosted back office for freelancers: receipts, invoices, and tax reporting

hero.title: Self-hosted back office for freelancers: receipts, invoices, and tax reporting
hero.subtitle: Run client work, issue invoices, and keep your transaction archive in one place.

features.title: Freelancer Ops
features.subtitle: Taxinator keeps the operational and tax side of your business in one workflow

aiScanner.title: Turn receipts and supplier documents into structured transactions
aiScanner.desc1: Upload your receipts or invoices in PDF for automatic recognition
aiScanner.desc2: Extract key information like dates, items, and vendors
aiScanner.desc3: Works with any language and any photo quality
aiScanner.desc4: Automatically organize everything into a structured database
aiScanner.desc5: Bulk upload and analyze multiple files at once

currencyConverter.title: Automatically convert currencies (even crypto!)
currencyConverter.desc1: Detects foreign currencies and converts it to yours
currencyConverter.desc2: Knows historical exchange rates on a date of transaction
currencyConverter.desc4: Works with popular cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, etc.)
currencyConverter.desc5: Still allows you to fill it manually

filtersAndCategories.title: Organize your transactions using fully customizable categories, projects and fields
filtersAndCategories.desc1: Absolute freedom to create custom categories, projects and fields
filtersAndCategories.desc2: Add, edit and manage your transactions
filtersAndCategories.desc3: Filter by any column, category or date range
filtersAndCategories.desc4: Customize which columns to show in the table

invoiceGenerator.title: Create invoices, quotes, and reusable billing templates
invoiceGenerator.desc1: Generate polished invoices and quotes with your own branding
invoiceGenerator.desc2: Keep client-facing copy, labels, and totals editable
invoiceGenerator.desc3: Export invoices to PDF or store them back in your transaction ledger
invoiceGenerator.desc4: Save templates for repeated billing flows
invoiceGenerator.desc5: Combine VAT, retention, and extra fees without leaving the app

customLlm.title: Tune any LLM prompt to extract anything you need
customLlm.desc1: Expand and improve your Taxinator instance with custom LLM prompts
customLlm.desc2: Create custom fields and categories and tell AI how to parse them for you
customLlm.desc3: Extract any additional information you need
customLlm.desc4: Automatically categorize by project or category
customLlm.desc5: Ask AI to assess risk level or any other criteria

dataExport.title: Your Data — Your Rules
dataExport.desc1: Deploy your own instance of Taxinator for 100% privacy
dataExport.desc2: Export your transactions to CSV for tax prep
dataExport.desc3: Full-text search across documents and invoices
dataExport.desc4: Download full data archive to migrate to another service

deployment.title: Choose How You Want To Run Taxinator

selfHosted.title: Self-Hosted Edition
selfHosted.deploy: Deploy at your own infrastructure or home server
selfHosted.bringKeys: Bring your own keys (OpenAI, Gemini, Mistral, etc.)

cloud.title: Cloud Edition
cloud.saas: SaaS version if you do not want to handle your own servers and deployments
cloud.aiKeys: We provide you with AI keys and storage
cloud.subscription: Yearly subscription plans. No hidden fees

upcoming.title: Upcoming Features
upcoming.subtitle: We're a small, indie project constantly improving. Here's what we're working on next.

aiAnalytics.title: Better AI Analytics & Agents
aiAnalytics.desc2: AI agents to automate your workflows

presetsPlugins.title: Presets and Plugins
presetsPlugins.desc1: Presets for different countries and industries

footer.stayTunedDesc: We're working hard on making Taxinator useful for everyone. Star and watch our GitHub repo to get notified about new features and releases.

newsletter.title: Stay Tuned
newsletter.description: We're working hard on making Taxinator useful for everyone. Subscribe to our emails to get notified about our plans and new features. No marketing, ads or spam.
newsletter.success: Thanks for subscribing! Check your email for confirmation.

auth.welcome: Welcome to your own instance of Taxinator. Let's set up a couple of settings to get started.
auth.selfHostedNotEnabledDesc1: To use Taxinator in self-hosted mode, please set
auth.selfHostedNotEnabledDesc3: In self-hosted mode you can use your own ChatGPT API key and store your data on your own server.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email for the verification code
auth.cloudNotAvailable: Cloud plans are not available yet
auth.cloudNotAvailableDesc: Cloud plans are not available yet. Please use the self-hosted version or reach out for questions.
auth.step1: Open login page (opens in new tab)
auth.step2: Sign in with your Claude account
auth.step3: Copy the code shown after login
auth.noApiKeyNeeded: Connect your Claude or Codex subscription to process receipts with AI — no API key needed.
auth.alreadySubscribed: You are already subscribed to the newsletter
auth.failedToSubscribe: Failed to subscribe. Please try again later.
auth.subscriptionExpired: Your subscription has expired. Click here to select a new plan. Otherwise, your account will be deleted.
auth.connectToCompany: Connect to a company database to get started
auth.databaseConnectionHint: Provide an empty database to restore into

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.controlRoomSubtitle: Cash flow, spend mix, and vendor trends at a glance
dashboard.cashFlowDescription: Income, expenses, and net cash flow in the selected range.
dashboard.expenseBreakdownDescription: Where spend is concentrated across categories.
dashboard.topMerchantsDescription: Largest spend vendors by transaction volume.
dashboard.profitTrendDescription: The direction of business profit over time.
dashboard.otherCurrenciesNote: Not shown: {count} transactions in {currencies} (no converted value available).
dashboard.emptyAnalyticsDescription: Once transactions are categorized, charts will appear here.
dashboard.errorDescription: Analytics could not be loaded right now. Try again in a moment.
dashboard.dropFilesHere: Take a photo or drop your files here
dashboard.uploadReceipts: upload receipts, invoices and any other documents for me to scan

welcome.description: I'm a little accountant app that helps you deal with endless receipts, checks and invoices with (you guessed it) AI. Here's what I can do:
welcome.uploadPhoto: Upload me a photo or a PDF and I will recognize, categorize and save it as a transaction for your tax advisor.
welcome.convertCurrencies: I can automatically convert currencies and look up exchange rates for a given date.
welcome.cryptoSupport: I even support crypto! Historical exchange rates for staking too.
welcome.customPrompts: All LLM prompts are configurable: for fields, categories and projects. You can go to settings and change them however you want.
welcome.localDatabase: I save data in a local SQLite database and can export it to CSV and ZIP archives.
welcome.customFields: You can even create your own new fields to be analyzed and they will be included in the CSV export for your tax advisor.
welcome.useAtOwnRisk: I'm still very young and can make mistakes. Use me at your own risk!
welcome.recommendAdvisor: While I can save you a lot of time in categorizing transactions and generating reports, I still highly recommend giving the results to a professional tax advisor for review when filing your taxes!
welcome.giveChatGptKey: Please give your ChatGPT key here
welcome.welcomeDescription: Your self-hosted back office for Canary Islands businesses. Manage receipts, invoices, and IGIC/IRPF tax calculations — all powered by AI.
welcome.welcomeUpload: Upload receipts, invoices, or bank statements
welcome.welcomeUploadDesc: — AI extracts and categorizes transactions automatically.
welcome.welcomeBankStatementDesc: — upload a PDF, AI splits it into individual transactions and matches them to your invoices.
welcome.welcomeIgicDesc: — Modelo 420 (quarterly) and Modelo 425 (annual) for Canary Islands, plus Modelo 130 (IRPF) for autonomos and Modelo 202/200 for SLs.
welcome.welcomeMultiCompanyDesc: — manage multiple businesses from one instance, each with its own database.
welcome.welcomeInvoicingDesc: — create, track, and export professional invoices with IGIC and IRPF.
welcome.welcomeExportDesc: — generate organized ZIP bundles with all your financial data.
welcome.welcomeAiDesc: — Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Mistral, OpenRouter, or any custom OpenAI-compatible API.

transactions.title: Transactions

reclassify.title: Reclassify transaction types
reclassify.subtitle: Heuristic scan over your transactions — description, merchant, and amount sign — suggesting better types where the current one looks off. Review per-row or apply the whole group.
reclassify.empty: Nothing to suggest — every transaction's type looks plausible.

allocations.empty: No invoices or purchases linked to this transaction yet.
allocations.hint: Add or change allocations on the Reconcile page — drag invoices or purchases onto this transaction.
allocations.unlinkConfirmDesc: Remove the link between this transaction and {number}? The document keeps existing; only the allocation is deleted.

transactions.noTransactions: You don't seem to have any transactions yet. Let's start and create the first one!
transactions.name: Name
transactions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete these transactions and all their files? This action cannot be undone.
transactions.confirmDeletePermanent: Are you sure? This will delete the transaction with all the files permanently

transfers.awaitingMatchBadge: Awaiting match — counterparty account set, specific row not found yet

transferDetail.unmatchedLabel: Unmatched transfer — no counterparty linked yet
transferDetail.unlinkConfirmBody: Both legs will go back to their original income/expense classification. The underlying rows will not be deleted.

bulkActions.linkAsTransferDialogBody: Which way did the money flow?
bulkActions.linkAsTransferNeedsAccounts: Both transactions need an account set before they can be linked.
bulkActions.linkAsTransferSameAccount: Selected rows are on the same account. Transfers must cross accounts.
bulkActions.linkAsTransferAlreadyLinked: One of the selected rows is already part of a transfer.
bulkActions.linkAsTransferCurrencyMismatch: The selected rows have different currencies.
bulkActions.linkAsTransferAmountMismatch: Amounts or dates differ — linked anyway, double-check the pair.

transactions.reanalyzeDesc: AI will re-categorize the selected transactions. Review changes before applying.
transactions.noChanges: AI found no changes to suggest

receipts.dropHint: PDF or image files · multiple allowed
receipts.reviewSubtitle: {count} receipt(s) ready to commit. Accept the AI's suggestion, pick a different transaction, or keep as orphan.
receipts.commitSuccessDetail: {count} receipt(s) attached or booked as new transactions.
receipts.attachDialogSubtitle: Pick an orphan file, or upload a new one.
receipts.noOrphans: No orphan files available. Upload a new receipt instead.

invoices.title: Invoices

gaps.hint: Spanish law requires non-skipping correlative numbering per series.

invoices.clientSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, tax ID, or city
invoices.deleteInvoice: Delete this invoice? This cannot be undone.
invoices.deleteConfirm: Delete this invoice? This cannot be undone.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search number, contact, NIF, or notes
filters.missingFileTooltip: No PDF attached to this invoice. Generate one from the invoice data or upload a copy.
filters.hasFileTooltip: PDF attached. Click the file icon to preview.

statusHelp.draft: Work-in-progress. Not sent yet and excluded from revenue calculations.
statusHelp.sent: Issued to the client and awaiting payment.
statusHelp.overdue: Sent but past its due date without payment.
statusHelp.paid: Fully paid. Payment date can be manual or derived from a linked transaction.
statusHelp.cancelled: Voided or rectified. Excluded from revenue calculations.

attachPdf.noneHint: Attach a PDF or image of the original invoice, or regenerate one from the invoice data.
attachPdf.dialogTitle: Attach a PDF to this invoice
attachPdf.dialogSubtitle: Pick an existing orphaned file or upload a new one.
attachPdf.noOrphans: No orphaned files to attach. Upload a new one below.
attachPdf.rowHint: Preview, download, replace, or regenerate the attached PDF.
attachPdf.regenerateConfirm: Replace the currently attached PDF with a freshly generated one from the invoice data?

uploadExternal.title: AI Import — existing invoice
uploadExternal.description: Drop an invoice PDF or image and we'll extract the number, dates, total, and VAT for you to review before saving.
uploadExternal.pickHelp: We'll scan the file with AI and extract the number, dates, total, and VAT so you can just double-check them.
uploadExternal.reviewHint: AI-suggested values — review and edit before saving.
uploadExternal.clientNotInList: AI suggested contact "{name}" but no match was found. Add them, pick one from the list, or leave blank.
uploadExternal.createClientTitle: New contact — review the details before saving.
uploadExternal.clientCreated: New contact added and selected below.

import.title: AI Import — invoices
import.subtitle: Drop one or more invoice PDFs or images. We'll process them one at a time and let you review before saving.
import.dropHere: Drop files here or pick manually.
import.formats: PDF or image · multiple files supported
import.pickAtLeastOne: Select at least one extracted invoice to import.
import.duplicateHint: Another invoice with this number already exists.

link.title: Link invoice to a transaction
link.subtitle: Pick the transaction that paid this invoice. Outstanding: {outstanding}.
link.noCandidates: No unallocated transactions yet — record the payment as a transaction first.
link.amountHint: Defaults to the smaller of invoice outstanding and transaction free balance.

reconcile.title: Reconcile
reconcile.subtitleV2: Drag an invoice or purchase onto the transaction that settled it, or let AI propose matches. Cash deposits and aggregated cash payouts are supported.
reconcile.noUnpaidInvoices: Nothing outstanding — you're all caught up.
reconcile.noLinkedInvoices: No invoices linked to transactions yet.
reconcile.noLinkedPurchases: No purchases linked to transactions yet.
reconcile.unlinkConfirmDesc: Remove the link between this transaction and {number}? The document keeps existing; only the allocation is deleted.
reconcile.driftTooltip: Amount is {diff} off from the document total — likely rounding drift. If this is a cent-scale mismatch, the source PDF's printed total was lost when the purchase was imported.

snap.tooltip: For every paid document where the stored total drifts < €1 from what was actually paid, adopt the paid amount as the printed total.
snap.confirmDesc: For {invoices} invoices and {purchases} purchases, set the printed total to the amount actually paid (drift ≤ €1). {skipped} docs skipped because the drift was larger than €1.
snap.noneFixed: No drifted totals found within the €1 tolerance.
snap.noneFixable: Nothing to fix — all totals are already clean.

resync.tooltip: Revert invoices/purchases marked 'paid' but with zero linked payments (e.g. after deleting the transactions they were matched to).
resync.confirmDesc: {invoices} invoices and {purchases} purchases are marked 'paid' but have zero linked payments (likely because the linked transactions were deleted). Revert them to 'sent' / 'received'?
resync.noneFixable: No stale paid documents — every paid doc still has payments linked.

reconcile.refundsInvoiceHint: Paying a client back? Drag an invoice here to record the refund.
reconcile.refundsPurchaseHint: A supplier paid you back? Drag a refunded purchase onto the matching income transaction.

quotes.title: Quotes
quotes.notesPlaceholder: Terms and conditions, validity period, etc.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.noContacts: No contacts yet. Add your first contact to get started.
contacts.name: Name
contacts.bankDetailsPlaceholder: IBAN, BIC/SWIFT, account holder — whatever the payer needs

import.title: Import contacts with AI
import.subtitle: Drop a PDF directory, CSV/XLSX export, or a business-card image. The AI extracts contacts so you can review them before saving.
import.extractFailed: We couldn't extract contacts from that file.
import.noContactsFound: No contacts were detected in that file.
import.reviewHint: Review the {filename} suggestions and tick which to import.
import.duplicateHint: Looks like a contact you already have
import.pickAtLeastOne: Tick at least one contact to import

purchases.title: Purchases
purchases.empty: No purchases yet. Record a supplier invoice to keep your libro de facturas recibidas up to date.
purchases.supplierNumberHint: Enter the invoice number exactly as it appears on the supplier's invoice.

statusHelp.draft: Work-in-progress. Not yet booked into the libro — excluded from VAT calculations.
statusHelp.received: Booked into the libro but still unpaid. Counts toward input VAT (IGIC/IVA soportado).
statusHelp.overdue: Received but past its due date without payment.
statusHelp.paid: Fully paid. Payment date can be manual or derived from the linked transaction.
statusHelp.cancelled: Annulled or rectified by the supplier. Excluded from VAT calculations.
statusHelp.refunded: Returned or credited. Linked to a matching refund transaction for reconciliation.

purchases.paidAtHint: Left blank: uses the date of the latest linked transaction.
purchases.itemsRequired: Add at least one line item.
purchases.irpfHint: Only apply when this supplier's invoice includes an IRPF retention.
purchases.printedTotalPlaceholder: Leave blank to compute from items
purchases.printedTotalHint: Optional — copy the exact total from the supplier invoice. Avoids a few-cent drift from VAT rounding.
purchases.deleteConfirm: This will remove the purchase and its line items. Allocations to transactions will be unlinked.

filters.missingFileTooltip: No supplier invoice attached — required for VAT deduction.
filters.noMatches: No purchases match the current filters.

import.title: AI-powered purchase import
import.subtitle: Drop a supplier invoice register (CSV / XLSX / PDF), a single supplier invoice, or a receipt. The AI extracts rows for you to review before saving.
import.dropHere: Drop a file here or click to browse
import.formats: CSV · XLSX · PDF · JPG / PNG / HEIC
import.extractFailed: Couldn't extract anything from this file.
import.noPurchasesFound: No purchases found in this document.
import.reviewHint: Extracted from {filename}. Edit any row before importing.
import.duplicateHint: Looks like a purchase you already have.
import.pickAtLeastOne: Pick at least one row to import.
import.attachPromptTitle: Looks like a purchase you already have.
import.attachPromptSubtitle: Attach this file to the existing purchase #{number} — it will also show up on any transaction already paying it.

link.title: Match to a transaction
link.subtitle: Pick an expense transaction that pays this purchase. Outstanding: {outstanding}.
link.noCandidates: No unallocated expense transactions to match.

products.title: Products
products.noProducts: No products yet. Add products or services to use in your invoices.
products.name: Name

tax.title: Tax Calculator
tax.modelo130Cumulative: Modelo 130 amounts are cumulative from January 1 to the end of the quarter, per AEAT instructions.
tax.modelo420Quarterly: Modelo 420 amounts correspond only to the selected quarter.
tax.igicEstimateWarning: * IGIC on expenses is estimated at 7% inclusive. Verify the actual IGIC on your supplier invoices.
tax.amountToPayATC: Amount to pay to Agencia Tributaria Canaria
tax.modelo202Cumulative: Modelo 202 amounts are cumulative from January 1 to the end of the quarter, per AEAT instructions.
tax.corporateNoPaymentDue: Previous quarterly payments cover the current installment. No amount to pay.
tax.corporateLegalDisclaimerText: These figures are indicative and calculated automatically from invoices and expenses recorded. Always verify amounts before filing declarations with the Agencia Tributaria Canaria (Modelo 420) and AEAT (Modelo 202). IGIC on expenses is estimated and may differ from reality.
tax.witholdingsCoverPayment: Withholdings cover the quarterly payment. No amount to pay.
tax.legalDisclaimerText: These figures are indicative and calculated automatically from invoices and expenses recorded. Always verify amounts before filing declarations with the Agencia Tributaria Canaria (Modelo 420) and AEAT (Modelo 130). IGIC on expenses is estimated and may differ from reality.
tax.cryptoSectionSubtitle: Realised gains roll into the base del ahorro (autónomo) or the corporate tax base (SL). Holdings feed Modelo 721.
tax.untrackedDisposalsHint: {count} disposals still missing cost basis — add it to sharpen the estimate.

checklist.title: Filing checklist
checklist.filingComplete: All steps complete — this filing is done.

tax.recordPastFilingDescription: Log a modelo you already filed through another system. The amount and confirmation number are optional but help your history stay complete.
tax.recordPastFilingAmountHelp: Positive = paid, negative = refund received. Leave empty if not applicable.
tax.recordPastFilingAmountInvalid: Amount must be a valid number.

personal.title: Personal income
personal.subtitle: Extras that fold into your Modelo 100.
personal.indexSubtitle: Payslips, investments, rentals, and deductions — everything that feeds your personal Modelo 100.

employment.title: Employment income
employment.pageSubtitle: Track employers and import nómina PDFs.
employment.emptyHint: Add your first employer or drop a payslip PDF.
employment.yearNoDataHint: No salary-linked transactions in this year.
employment.confirmDeleteBody: Remove {name}? Linked transactions will lose their employer tag.
employment.addDialogSubtitle: Manually add a payer; upload a payslip to import amounts.
employment.addDialogChooseSubtitle: Create from scratch, or copy one from another profile.
employment.createManuallyHint: Enter the name and NIF yourself.
employment.uploadDialogSubtitle: Drop a Spanish nómina PDF or image. AI extracts employer + amounts.
employment.reviewNeeded: AI couldn't extract the employer name.
employment.reviewNeededHint: Upload a clearer scan or add the employer manually.

detail.monthLegend: Filled = payslip attached · outlined = deposit only · grey = nothing recorded
detail.monthLegendColor: Each month has its own colour — matching the stripe on its linked transactions. Orange dot = a deposit that month is missing a payslip.
detail.noLinkedYet: No transactions linked for this year yet.
detail.chipNoIrpf: No IRPF extracted — add a payslip

rental.title: Rental income
rental.confirmDeleteBody: Remove {name}? Linked rent deposits will lose their property tag.

deductions.title: Deductions
deductions.pageSubtitle: Deductions that reduce your Modelo 100 liability.
deductions.emptyHint: Add pension contributions, donations, or mortgage relief.
deductions.addDialogSubtitle: Keep supporting documents safe — you'll need them at filing time.

incomeSource.yearNoDataHint: No linked transactions in this year.

detail.monthLegendColor: Each month has its own colour — matching the stripe on its linked transactions. Orange dot = a deposit that month is missing its document.
detail.noLinkedYet: No transactions linked for this year yet.
detail.chipNoIrpf: No IRPF extracted — add a payslip

dividend.title: Dividend income
dividend.pageSubtitle: Track payers that pay you dividends and their withholding.
dividend.emptyHint: Add the first payer that distributes dividends to you.
dividend.confirmDeleteBody: Remove {name}? Linked distributions will lose their payer tag.
dividend.addDialogSubtitle: Any issuer that pays you dividends (company, broker, ETF).

interest.title: Interest income
interest.pageSubtitle: Track accounts and counterparties that pay you interest.
interest.emptyHint: Add the first bank or counterparty that pays you interest.
interest.confirmDeleteBody: Remove {name}? Linked interest payments will lose their payer tag.
interest.addDialogSubtitle: Typically a bank or broker that pays you interest.

summary.title: Modelo 100 estimate · {year}
summary.disclaimer: Approximate. Uses average state + autonomous-community rates; real filing may differ.
summary.noIncomeYet: Link some personal income to see your estimated Modelo 100 liability.

chat.title: Assistant
chat.clearConfirmBody: This removes all messages. The agent keeps business facts you've shared.
chat.noProviderBody: Configure an LLM provider in Settings → LLM to use the assistant.

actions.pairTransfersBulkDescription: Scan {from} and {to} for unpaired transfers within ±1 day and link them
actions.pairTransfersBulkNoMatches: No unpaired matches found in that date range
actions.confirmBulkBody: Update {count} transactions? This can't be undone.
actions.confirmDeleteRuleBody: Delete this rule? Historic matches remain.
actions.tooManyMatches: Too many matches ({count}). Narrow the filter.

unsorted.title: Inbox
unsorted.subtitle: Files and AI sessions waiting for your review.
unsorted.llmKeyRequired: LLM provider API Key is required for analyzing files
unsorted.llmKeyRequiredDesc: Please set your LLM provider API key in the settings to use the analyze form.
unsorted.bankStatementDesc: This CSV file can be imported as a bank statement. Use the AI Import tool to match transactions with your accounts.

dataExport.title: Data Export
dataExport.description: Generate a complete data bundle for your accountant. Includes transactions, invoices, tax calculations, and receipt attachments — organized by period and ready to hand off.
dataExport.exportIncludes: Export includes transactions, invoices, tax reports (Modelo {models}), and receipt attachments.
dataExport.includes1: Transactions CSV with all categories, projects, and amounts
dataExport.includes2: Receipt and document attachments organized by transaction
dataExport.includes3: Invoices CSV with client, subtotal, IGIC, IRPF breakdown

settings.title: Settings
settings.accountantAccessDesc: Share read-only access to your financial data with your accountant or advisor. Each invite generates a unique link. You control exactly which sections they can see.
settings.categoriesSettingsDesc: Create your own categories that better reflect the type of income and expenses you have. Define an LLM Prompt so that AI can determine this category automatically.
settings.companiesDesc: Manage the businesses connected to this Taxinator instance. Each entity has its own database with separate transactions, invoices, and tax data.
settings.backupDesc: Download a complete backup of this company: full database dump + all uploaded files. This bundle can be imported on any Taxinator instance.
settings.googleDriveNotConfigured: To enable Google Drive backups, create OAuth credentials in the Google Cloud Console and enter them below.
settings.backupIncludes1: Complete database dump (all transactions, invoices, clients, tax data, settings)
settings.restoreHint: To restore, use "Import Company" on the login screen.
settings.irpfDesc: IRPF withholding applied on the taxable base
settings.removeEntityConfirm: Remove "{name}"? This only removes the connection — your database is not deleted.
settings.aiProvidersHint: Drag to set fallback order. Click the star to set as primary.
settings.projectsDesc: Use projects to differentiate between the type of activities you do For example: Freelancing, YouTube channel, Blogging. Projects are just a convenient way to separate statistics.
settings.categoriesDesc: Create your own categories that better reflect the type of income and expenses you have. Define an LLM Prompt so that AI can determine this category automatically.
settings.fieldsDesc: You can add new fields to your transactions. Standard fields can't be removed but you can tweak their prompts or hide them. If you don't want a field to be analyzed by AI but filled in by hand, leave the "LLM prompt" empty.
settings.currenciesDesc: Custom currencies would not be automatically converted but you still can have them.
settings.accountsDesc: Manage your accounts — banks, credit cards, crypto exchanges, crypto wallets, and cash.
settings.dangerDesc: The settings here will overwrite your existing fields, categories and prompts. Use them only if something is broken.
settings.llmSettingsResetDesc: This will reset the system prompt and other LLM settings to their default values
settings.fieldsCurrenciesCategoriesResetDesc: This will reset all fields, currencies and categories to their default values
settings.name: Name
settings.dataLocationDesc: All profile data (databases, uploads) is stored in this folder. You can point this at an external drive or cloud-synced folder.
settings.changeDataLocationConfirm: Changing the data location will restart the server. Existing data will not be moved automatically. Continue?
settings.aiImportDesc: Drop a CSV or PDF bank statement. AI will extract and categorize transactions for you to review before importing.
settings.extractingTransactions: Extracting transactions from PDF (this may take a minute)...
settings.dropFileHere: Drop CSV, XLSX, or PDF here
settings.multiFileHint: Drop one or more files. The first CSV (or first file) becomes the primary; others are attached as context for the AI.
settings.sharedBaseHint: Detected a duplicate pair: {pair}. Using the primary for parsing; the other is attached as context.
settings.rulesDesc: Define patterns to automatically categorize transactions. Manual rules always override AI suggestions.
settings.deleteRuleConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this rule?
settings.noRules: No rules defined yet. Add a rule to automatically categorize transactions.
settings.suggestedCategoriesDesc: AI suggests these new categories based on your transactions
settings.feedbackPlaceholder: Give instructions to the AI (e.g., 'merge these into one category')
settings.alwaysApplyRule: Always apply this for similar transactions?

import.title: Import from CSV
import.uploadCsvHint: Upload your CSV file to import transactions

export.title: Export Transactions
export.description: Export selected transactions and files as a CSV file or a ZIP archive
export.fieldsToInclude: Fields to be included in CSV

files.dropFilesToAdd: Drop Files to Add to Transaction
files.title: Files
files.subtitle: All files stored for this company.
files.confirmDelete: Delete this file? This cannot be undone.
files.confirmDeleteLinked: This file is attached to {target}. Deleting it will detach the attachment. Continue?
files.deleteAllOrphansConfirm_one: This permanently removes {count} orphan file. This cannot be undone.
files.deleteAllOrphansConfirm_other: This permanently removes {count} orphan files. This cannot be undone.

accountantInvite.name: Name *
accountantInvite.deleteConfirm: Delete invite for "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

wizard.title: AI Accountant
wizard.subtitle: Conversational categorization with an AI accountant that learns about your business
wizard.uploadHint: Drop a CSV or PDF here, or click to choose
wizard.retryHint: Your last message wasn't processed — retry?
wizard.lockStale: Another tab is sending a message — wait or steal the lock.
wizard.confirmAbandon: Close this session? It will be archived — you can reopen it from the inbox.
wizard.confirmDelete: Permanently delete this session? This cannot be undone.
wizard.candidatePanelEmpty: No transactions yet — start the conversation to add or import some.
wizard.bulkActionCreateIncomeSourceHint: Creates {kind} income source "{name}" and links these rows to it.
wizard.bulkActionIncomeSourceCreated: Income source created and linked to {count} transaction(s).
wizard.ruleConflictWarning: Skipped changes that would override an existing rule.
wizard.onboardingHint: A couple of quick questions so I categorize things correctly.
wizard.assistantFailure: I hit a snag. You can retry the last message, or rephrase it.
wizard.commitDisabledHint: Review all rows and assign a category to every business row before committing.
wizard.commitWithDeferredOne: Committed · 1 deferred row moved to a new session
wizard.commitWithDeferredMany: Committed · {count} deferred rows moved to a new session
wizard.probingHelp: Click any tip to save it as a durable fact for future sessions.

transfers.deferRow: Skip this row — keep in session but don't commit yet
transfers.includeRow: Include this row in the commit
transfers.pickCounterAccount: Which of your accounts is the other side?

contextFiles.autoAnalyzeOne: I just attached {name} as context. Please scan it and factor anything relevant into the current review — reclassify rows or propose rules if the new material warrants it.
contextFiles.autoAnalyzeMany: I just attached the following context files: {names}. Please scan them and factor anything relevant into the current review — reclassify rows or propose rules if the new material warrants it.
contextFiles.analyzeFailed: Context attached but analysis failed — try sending a message to kick it off.

committed.noBusinessActivityHint: No business activity in this session — crypto disposals are taxed on Modelo 100 savings base (ganancia patrimonial), staking rewards as rendimientos capital mobiliario. See rollups below.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Downloadable PDF reports for every committed AI Accountant session.
reports.archiveConfirm: Archive this report? It will be hidden from the list but the underlying transactions stay untouched.

knowledge.title: Tax knowledge packs
knowledge.refreshNoChanges: Refresh succeeded but content was identical ({provider})

aiMemory.title: AI memory
aiMemory.subtitle: What the assistant has learned about your business. You told it some of this directly; it inferred the rest from your transactions and conversations. Edit or remove anything that looks wrong.
aiMemory.empty: The AI hasn't recorded anything yet.
aiMemory.emptyHint: Use the wizard or chat — facts will appear here as they're extracted.
aiMemory.deleteConfirmBody: The AI will forget "{key}". It may re-learn it from future conversations. Continue?

crypto.title: Crypto
crypto.subtitle: Disposals, cost basis, and realised gain across your crypto activity.
crypto.disposalsEmpty: No crypto disposals yet for this year.
crypto.noSuggestions: No obvious bank-deposit ↔ disposal pairings right now.
crypto.untrackedWarning: {count} disposals without cost basis — add it so the gain is correct.
crypto.accountTypeHint: Mark crypto accounts in Settings → Accounts so the wizard recognises exchange payouts automatically.
crypto.holdingsEmpty: No open crypto lots. Record a purchase or airdrop to start the FIFO ledger.
crypto.backfillMetadataHint: Re-reads the original upload files and reconstructs missing crypto metadata (asset, quantity, price) from the CSV/XLSX columns, then replays FIFO.
crypto.matchedLotsEmpty: No lots matched yet — run Replay FIFO on /crypto if this looks wrong.
crypto.yearNoDataHint: No crypto transactions in this year yet.
crypto.diagNoDataAnywhere: Import crypto exchange exports to populate this page.
crypto.diagFifoEmpty: {count} disposals found but the FIFO ledger is empty. Run Replay FIFO to compute cost basis and gains.
crypto.diagMissingPrice: {count} disposals are missing price metadata and can't be summed.
